title: vendor: update selinux
body:
inherit a change for not failing a recursive relabelling if the file
is removed between the directory is read and the lsetxattr syscall.

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I was just doing a similar vendor.  Will merge this as soon as it passes.
Would fix this issue on buildah as well.
https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1826

:pushpin: Commit 9310020 has been approved by `rhatdan`
